title: Company Overview
content:
Attic Shield is a licensed attic insulation, rodent proofing, and crawl space company.
Phone: (858) 402-0066 | Email: Info@AtticShield.com
Address: 632 Rock Springs Rd, Escondido CA 92025
License: C-2 #1127450, B #1138021
Hours: Mon-Fri 7am-5pm, Sun 9am-2pm, Sat Closed
BBB A+ Rated, Bonded & Insured, 20+ Years Experience
5,000+ Homes Protected, 4.9 Average Rating

title: Services Overview
content: Attic Shield offers: Attic Cleaning & Decontamination, Attic Insulation Removal & Installation (blown-in fiberglass, fiberglass batts), Attic Rodent Proofing (seal entry points, exclude pests), Attic Sanitization (EPA-registered disinfectants), Attic Air Sealing (reduce energy loss, lower bills), Duct Repair & Replacement, Crawl Space Cleanup, Insulation & Rodent Proofing, Vapor Barrier Installation, Mobile Home Services, Attic Fan & UV Light Installation.

title: Why Choose Attic Shield
content: C-2 Licensed Insulation Contractor - the only classification legally allowed for insulation work in California. Free Inspections, Honest Quotes. Eco-Friendly Materials (low-VOC, formaldehyde-free, recycled content). Title 24 Energy Code Compliant. Certified & Experienced Technicians. Digital photo documentation with every inspection.

title: Service Areas
content:
San Diego County: San Diego, Chula Vista, Eastlake, Otay Ranch, Rolling Hills Ranch, Escondido, Hidden Meadows, Valley Center, Oceanside, Leucadia, Carlsbad, Bressi Ranch, El Cajon, Bostonia, Fletcher Hills, Lakeside, Bonsall, Rancho Penasquitos, Vista, San Marcos, Rancho Santa Fe, Lake San Marcos, Encinitas, Cardiff-by-the-Sea, Poway, National City, Miramar, Allied Gardens, Imperial Beach, Solana Beach, Del Mar, La Jolla, Balboa Park, Clairemont, Hillcrest, Mira Mesa, Ocean Beach, Pacific Beach, Point Loma, Rancho Bernardo, University City, North Park
Southwest Riverside County: Murrieta, Temecula, Wildomar, Lake Elsinore, Canyon Lake, Menifee, Perris
South Orange County: San Clemente, San Juan Capistrano, Dana Point, Laguna Niguel, Mission Viejo, Aliso Viejo, Rancho Santa Margarita, Ladera Ranch

title: Attic Insulation Service
content: Attic Insulation Removal and Installation. We use blown-in fiberglass and fiberglass batts. Proper insulation keeps your home energy efficient, reduces utility bills, and maintains consistent temperature year-round. We also provide air sealing to prevent energy loss.

title: Attic Rodent Proofing
content: We seal all entry points to prevent rodents, bats, and other pests from entering your attic. Our exclusion techniques are thorough and long-lasting. We identify and seal gaps, holes, and potential entryways.

title: Attic Sanitization
content: EPA-registered disinfectants are used to sanitize your attic after rodent removal. Safe for families and pets. Eliminates bacteria, viruses, and odors left behind by pests.

title: Crawl Space Services
content: Crawl Space Cleanup, Insulation, Rodent Proofing, and Vapor Barrier Installation. We clean, seal, and insulate crawl spaces to prevent moisture damage, pest intrusion, and energy loss.

title: Free Inspections & Quotes
content: Attic Shield offers free inspections and honest quotes. No pressure, no gimmicks. Call (858) 402-0066 to schedule a free inspection today. We provide digital photo documentation with every inspection.

title: Insulation Contractor License
content: Attic Shield holds a C-2 Insulation Contractor License #1127450 and a B General Building License #1138021. The C-2 license is the only classification legally allowed to perform insulation work in California.
